name: Tsunagu Hidaka
description:
"The truth is, I've never seen a dog before.

When i meet one, I'll try talking to it."

-

Heyy everyone.. so i LOVE this guy, and i hate that there were no bots about him! Hes such a sweetheart and everything.

You are basically Mari here, but without the fence climbing scene. I made him bi so both the girls and gays can.. "enjoy him".

Have fun!
creator: _Merkk
